title: Doflamingo Faces Law
description: Pages 14–18 focus on doflamingo faces law, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Kyros as the flashback closes as Law's present battle against Doflamingo becomes a fight to honor Corazon's love and sacrifice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: From start to finish, you've just been a thorn in my side!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why do you oppose me so, Cora- Zon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why must I, for the second time, kill my own flesh and blood!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Cora- San!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Are you really gonna be okay!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I can't pull the trigger. You look...

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: Too much like Father.

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: You said you had it under control!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Listen up, law!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: pirates are the type of people that, when they see a treasure chest,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Can't help but bring it back to their own ship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: In other words, if you just stay put right here, your chance to make it out of this cage will definitely come!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Don't miss it!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: What about you, Cora-san!?

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: Stupid... Doffy's after...

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: You and the ope ope no mi's power.

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: I'm doffy's one and only true brother.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He's obviously going to lose his shit, but he won't kill me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Oh, okay.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: "Calm"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Okay, now any sounds you happen to make will disappear!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Let's meet in the neighbor- ing city, okay?

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: By the way, law,

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: I love you!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: This isn't what you promised, Cora-san!

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: You said you wouldn't be killed!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: law ain't gonna obey you, doffy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: That kid's beaten his fate... he triumphed over the prediction he'd die in three years.

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: He isn't the law that lost sight of himself and wandered his way to the foot of the Mad Pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: There's nothing he could possibly learn from you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: ...the poster child of absolute destructive-tion!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Just leave him be already!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: He's free!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: You slept like a baby, didn't ya?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Alright, I get it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: I dare you to repeat that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Who'd ya' say was a monster!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Whoa! He lit himself on fire while tripping!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Not yet... I've gotta hold on for just a little while longer...if I bite it now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: The magic I've placed on you will be dispelled and your voice...your cries will echo across this island...

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: walk, law.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Bring the boat this way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: unnoticed...quietly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Far away... Far, far away...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Nothing will bind you anymore...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Not the iron borders of the white city...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Nor your shortened lifespan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Nothing will restrict you anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: You gotta be shifting me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: That's Tsuru's Battle- Ship!

summary: Doflamingo Faces Law advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
